plan_binding_snapshot.title: CP00-543 RP17.P07.M06.S06-RP17.P08.M02.S14 generated_from_weighted_implementation_ledger
plan_binding_snapshot.renumbering_policy: Pack IDs are monotonic after the latest live closeout pack. If a requested locked queue skips live-open ledger units, live-open units are inserted first and requested packs are shifted with correction_reason.

implementation_summary.summary: CP00-543 implements descriptor-only coverage of the RP17 p07 closeout p08 foundation: the P07 Synthetic Fixture Set tail (the seventeen remaining rows), the full P07 Test And Golden Case Set, Hermes Evidence Packet, Claude Review Packet, and Closeout And Next Handoff cycles, the full P08 Scope Inventory and Contract Draft cycles, and the P08 Type And Shape Definition head (the first fourteen rows) as eight descriptor-only sections over 150 planned rows with Hermes evidence (H17), Claude review packet (C17), and CP00-544 handoff, without opening AI governance, model policy, retrieval scope, or citation runtime or any other closed runtime surface.

parsed_review.summary: CP00-543 is a descriptor-only AI-governance closeout pack (150 RP17 units, RP17.P07.M06.S06-RP17.P08.M02.S14, risk C). Read-only inspection confirms the pack-level production_ready claim is honest and supported: manifest and command-evidence both report production_ready:false, runtime_ready:false, implementation_layer:descriptor, status implemented_pending_review, with gate_outcome implementation_gates_passed_post_review_closeout_pending. Coverage, deliverable/phase/micro-title distributions match exactly across prompt, baseline, manifest, registry requirements (AI_GOVERNANCE_CORE_CP543_REQUIREMENTS) and contract; validateAiGovernanceCoreCp543Coverage enforces every dimension and node:test cases assert validity. Descriptor-only/no-write boundaries are intact: every section row is descriptor_only:true/runtime_execution:false/customer_safe_errors_only:true/raw_payload_included:false, freezeCp543Result attaches an exhaustive no-write/no-runtime/no-leak attestation, and the NO_WRITE_ATTESTATION inheritance chain carries the full base flag set from CP514. Claude remains a read-only reviewer and not final approver (read_only:true, tools Read/Grep/Glob, claude_is_final_approval:false, promotes_claude_to_final_approval:false, human approval markers present, commit gated after adjudication/inspection in hardened_review_sequence). Hermes patterns are confined to deterministic review packet/receipt descriptors (hermes_runtime_embedded_in_product:false, emits_hermes_runtime_receipt:false). CP178+ hardening blockers are defined and the auth preflight passed (exit 0, 1468-byte stdout, ok:true). All 7 required public exports exist and are reachable via index.js export *. One non-blocking P3: changed-file-scope.json double-classifies two untracked paths, but active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty so the net scoping is correct. No P0/P1/P2 issues found.

findings.title: changed-file-scope.json double-classifies two untracked paths as both implementation and unrelated
findings.details: docs/closeout-pack-plan/new-session-handoff.md and docs/closeout-packs/cp00-543/ appear in both untracked_implementation_files (lines 151-154) and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved (lines 156-169). docs/closeout-packs/cp00-543/ is in fact this pack's own manifest+command-evidence directory and was inspected as in-scope evidence, so labeling it 'unrelated' is internally inconsistent. The net effect is harmless because active_untracked_implementation_files_omitted is empty, so no in-scope implementation file was dropped from review.
findings.recommendation: Cosmetic bookkeeping only; optionally have the scope generator avoid listing a path in both untracked_implementation_files and unrelated_dirty_files_preserved. No action required for CP00-543 closeout.

commit_policy.message: Close CP00-543 ai governance core p07 closeout p08 foundation descriptor pack
